name: BanAppeals
short: Moderate ban appeals in a forum or text channel.
description: Validates ban appeal posts, requires Ban ID, adds staff action buttons, tracks denial cooldowns, manages final-chance handwritten challenge counts, and can optionally enrich appeals from a read-only ban API by Ban ID.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: BanAppeals loaded. Use `[p]appealset` to configure the appeal forum/text channel, logs, cooldown, challenge count, and optional Ban ID API lookup.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level appeal settings, optional API endpoint settings, staff role IDs, per-user denial cooldown timestamps, and appeal records containing Discord user IDs/names, message/thread/channel IDs, parsed appeal fields, validation warnings, staff action status, handler IDs/names, timestamps, and final-chance challenge counts. It does not store full appeal message content beyond the parsed appeal fields.
